## Type of Change

- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Enhancement (improvement to existing functionality)
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI / tooling
- [ ] Database migration

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding conventions
- [ ] I have written tests that cover the changes
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation
- [ ] I have not introduced any `any` types
- [ ] Domain terminology is correct (steward, not owner)

## Breaking Changes

<!-- List any breaking changes to APIs, database schema, or shared types. If none, write "None." -->

None.

## Domain Impact

<!-- Does this change affect capability model invariants? Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Modifies capability identity or ID generation
- [ ] Changes unique name enforcement
- [ ] Alters structural operations (re-parent, promote, demote, merge, retire)
- [ ] Affects published model version immutability
- [ ] Changes lifecycle state transitions
- [ ] Modifies stewardship assignment logic
- [ ] Adds or changes downstream consumer contracts
- [ ] Modifies change request or approval workflow
- [ ] Changes Prisma schema (migration included?)
